Reciprocity is one of the principles we should employ when we need to deepen, start, or repair a relationship. Also, it can serve as an early warning system for relationship development. For example, if someone isn't returning your calls or emails, that's a sign that you don't have the relationship you need to move forward with an influence appeal. If that's the case, you should heed these warnings and respond by trying to deepen or otherwise improve the relationship. And giving something of value first, which triggers a reciprocal exchange, is an excellent tool for building a relationship.
